pairwise_results.reason: Weaker competition must improve opportunity attractiveness.
Competition direction must remain correct when demand is weak.
Stronger demand must improve the demand component.
Measured local demand must earn more demand credit than a population estimate.
Healthy suitable-provider supply must improve provider suitability.
Healthy supply must outrank a demonstrably oversupplied market.
In-market providers must improve tenant suitability.
Directory displacement must reduce organic click availability.
Marketplace displacement must reduce organic click availability.
National-brand and shopping displacement must reduce organic clicks.
A domain dominating several valuable queries is a larger ranking obstacle.
A strong competitor at position ten is less threatening than at position one.

pairwise.reason: Confirmed operating status must outrank uncertain status.
Verified geographic proximity must improve suitability.
A direct contact channel must improve tenant reachability.
Stronger review evidence must improve the reputation signal.
